narrative:
Hilliard City has 27,550 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +3.5% D−R vs -15.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
